revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Asukanoyamakuchino Shrine
| native_name = 飛鳥山口坐神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Asukanoyamakuchino Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.479722|135.823079}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Asukanoyamakuchino Shrine'''|飛鳥山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Q85878469|ltq=Q85878469|qid=Q85878469|1=Keidai-Sessha}}
* {{ill|Q135009132|ltq=Q135009132|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}
** Series ordinal: 160
** P155: {{ill|Soganimasu Sogatsuhiko Shrine|lt=Soganimasu Sogatsuhiko Shrine|ja|宗我坐宗我都比古神社|qid=Q11451946|1=Soga-ni-masu Sogatsuhiko Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q11574285|ltq=Q11574285|qid=Q11574285|1=Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine}}
* {{ill|Asuka-ni-imasu Shrine|lt=Asuka-ni-imasu Shrine|ja|飛鳥坐神社|qid=Q11665959|1=Asuka-ni-Imasu Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q907495|ltq=Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}}
